summary: Granularni per-user capability granty nad ramec role pro law-office-mvp. Role dava baseline; grant ji ADITIVNE rozsiruje (allow-only). Granty se ukladaji do nove tabulky UserCapabilityGrant (org-scoped, 1:N user x capability, presence = grant), nacitaji se v getCurrentUser a pribali se na usera jako capabilities: Capability[], takze vsechny synchronni can*/assert* helpery v permissions.ts je vidi. MVP implementuje 2 capability: MANAGE_INVOICES a VIEW_RATES; enum je rozsiritelny. Pro fakturaci (R.77) se MENI default helperu z {ADMIN,PARTNER,LAWYER} na {ADMIN,PARTNER} a LAWYERi/ostatni dostavaji pristup pres grant MANAGE_INVOICES -> behavior change, resena data-migraci (grant vsem stavajicim aktivnim LAWYER). Admin UI je nova sekce v /settings (jen ADMIN/PARTNER) s jednim spolecnym ulozenim (setUserCapabilities).
assumptions: Allow-only granty staci pro MVP: jediny pripad, kde je potreba ZUZIT default (fakturace pro LAWYER), se resi zmenou role-defaultu helperu + data-migraci, ne explicit-deny. Tri-stav (allow/deny/inherit) se NEzavadi.

Granty jsou org-scoped pres organizationId na grant radku (stejne jako UserHoursPlan/ProjectAssignee), aby zustala izolace dat mezi kancelarmi single-tenant logiky a aby grant nemohl prelezt do jine org membershipu.

Capability VIEW_RATES je striktni rozsireni: default zustava 'jen ADMIN/PARTNER vidi sazby'; grant umozni i LAWYER/TRAINEE/INTERN videt sloupce sazeb (R.35 chce naopak SKRYT konkretnim lidem -> kdo nema grant a neni ADMIN/PARTNER, sazby nevidi, coz uz dnes plati pro ne-admin/partner).

Helpery v permissions.ts musi zustat synchronni a ciste; grant se k nim dostane VYHRADNE pres user objekt nesouci capabilities. String-only / role-only caller nema granty -> hasCapability=false -> fail-closed na role baseline.
DB v sandboxu neni dostupna -> migrace se pise rucne jako SQL (CREATE TYPE + CREATE TABLE), ne pres prisma migrate dev.
getCurrentUser je v React cache() -> jeden dotaz na granty za request, vykonove zanedbatelne.

Self-escalation: akce setUserCapabilities gatuje assertCanManageUsers (ADMIN/PARTNER) + overeni org membershipu ciloveho usera; ADMIN/PARTNER uz maji vse pres roli, takze grant sami sobe nic nepridava nad jejich roli (nemohou se povysit nad ADMIN).

open_questions.question: Data-migrace stavajicich LAWYER -> MANAGE_INVOICES: udelit automaticky vsem aktivnim LAWYER (zachova soucasne chovani), nebo nechat na adminovi (ciste naplni zadani R.77, ale advokati hned ztrati fakturaci)?
open_questions.safe_default: Udelit automaticky vsem aktivnim LAWYER membershipum v ramci migrace (no-regression). Admin je pak muze odebrat v /settings. Toto je bezpecny default proti provoznimu vypadku; pokud pravnici chteji opak, je to jednoradkova zmena WHERE v data-migraci.

open_questions.question: Ma se odkaz Fakturace v app-sidebar.tsx skryt uzivatelum bez MANAGE_INVOICES, nebo zustat viditelny (gate je jen na modulu BILLING)? Dnes billing/page.tsx gatuje pouze assertModuleEnabled, NE assertCanManageInvoices -> po zuzeni defaultu by LAWYER bez grantu videl stranku, ale akce by hazely chybu.
open_questions.safe_default: Pridat do sidebaru per-link 'capability' guard (vedle 'module') a zaroven do billing/page.tsx pridat assertCanManageInvoices, aby se stranka nezobrazila uzivateli bez opravneni misto vyhozeni chyby az pri akci. Bez tohoto kroku vznika UX regrese, proto je soucasti required_checks.

open_questions.question: Audit grantu: staci jeden AuditLog radek per save (entityType 'UserCapabilityGrant', diff added/removed), nebo radek per jednotlivy grant/revoke?
open_questions.safe_default: Jeden radek per save s oldValue/newValue = serazene pole capabilities (pred/po). Konzistentni s updateUserHoursPlan a mene sumu v auditu.

data_model.name: enum Capability
data_model.purpose: Rozsiritelny vycet udelitelnych schopnosti nad ramec role. MVP: 2 hodnoty; dalsi se pridavaji jako nova enum value (samostatna migrace ALTER TYPE ... ADD VALUE).
data_model.notes: Nepridavej hned MANAGE_AML/DEADLINES/DOCUMENTS/PORTAL/DATA_BOXES - enum je pripraven je prijmout, ale MVP implementuje jen 2, aby se vyhnulo predcasne abstrakci. Komentar u enumu uved: 'Pridani hodnoty = ALTER TYPE migrace + uprava prislusneho can*/assert* helperu, aby grant cetl + role-default fallback.'

data_model.name: model UserCapabilityGrant
data_model.purpose: Per-user x capability grant. Presence radku = grant udelen. 1:N (user ma 0..N grantu). Org-scoped pro izolaci a pro overeni, ze grant nesahá mimo membership usera.
data_model.prisma:
model UserCapabilityGrant {
  id             String     @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String
  userId         String
  capability     Capability
  grantedAt      DateTime   @default(now())
  grantedById    String?

  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user         User         @relation("UserCapabilityGrantUser", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  grantedBy    User?        @relation("UserCapabilityGrantGrantedBy", fields: [grantedById], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@unique([userId, capability])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("userCapabilityGrants")
}
data_model.notes: @@unique([userId, capability]) brani duplikatum a umoznuje deleteMany/createMany v jedne transakci pri save. organizationId je povinne (na rozdil od UserHoursPlan.organizationId? ktery je nullable kvuli legacy) - granty jsou citlive na izolaci. onDelete: Cascade na user i org. grantedById = SetNull (audit kdo udelil; nesmi blokovat smazani usera).

data_model.name: model User (relace)
data_model.notes: Vlozit do bloku relaci modelu User (kolem r.338-384 schema.prisma).

data_model.name: model Organization (relace)
data_model.purpose: Pridat zpetnou relaci org -> granty (kvuli onDelete: Cascade a konzistenci se vzorem ostatnich org-scoped satelitu).
data_model.notes: Vlozit do bloku relaci modelu Organization.

api_endpoints.style: server action (thick server action, zadne REST/tRPC - viz CLAUDE.md)
api_endpoints.name: setUserCapabilities
api_endpoints.signature: export async function setUserCapabilities(formData: FormData): Promise<void>
api_endpoints.input: userId: string (z FormData); capability checkboxy: jedno pole 'capabilities' (multi-value getAll) NEBO per-capability checkbox 'cap:MANAGE_INVOICES'/'cap:VIEW_RATES'. Doporuceno: formData.getAll('capabilities') -> string[] -> filtr na platne Capability hodnoty.
api_endpoints.authz: assertCanManageUsers(currentUser) (ADMIN/PARTNER) + overeni, ze cilovy userId je ACTIVE OrganizationMember v currentUser.organizationId (stejny pattern jako updateUserHoursPlan r.155-165). Bez tohoto by ADMIN/PARTNER mohl udelit grant uzivateli jine kancelare.
api_endpoints.idempotence: Idempotentni desired-state save: v jedne prisma.$transaction smazat vsechny granty usera (deleteMany where userId) a vytvorit createMany pro vybrane capability s organizationId = currentUser.organizationId. Tim odpada parovani allow/revoke a je to bezpecne vuci @@unique.
api_endpoints.side_effects: writeAuditLog/auditLog.create (entityType 'UserCapabilityGrant', entityId = userId, action 'UPDATE', oldValue/newValue = serazene pole capability stringu pred/po); revalidatePath('/settings') + revalidatePath('/work-logs') + revalidatePath('/billing') (aby se promitla zmena viditelnosti sazeb a fakturace).
api_endpoints.notes: Jeden spolecny save (R.4 doc: prilis mnoho tlacitek 'ulozit') - NE per-toggle akce. grantCapability/revokeCapability NEimplementovat jako verejne akce; desired-state save je jednodussi a atomicky.

folder_structure: src/lib/permissions.ts - rozsireni PermissionUser o capabilities + helper hasCapability + uprava canViewRates a assertCanManageInvoices/canManageInvoices
src/lib/auth.ts - getCurrentUser nacte granty a pribali capabilities[] na vraceny objekt
src/app/(app)/settings/page.tsx - nova sekce 'Opravneni uzivatelu' (jen ADMIN/PARTNER) s checkboxy per uzivatel a jednim save
prisma/schema.prisma - enum Capability + model UserCapabilityGrant + relace na User/Organization
prisma/migrations/<timestamp>_user_capability_grants/migration.sql - rucni SQL (CREATE TYPE + CREATE TABLE + indexy + FK + data-migrace)
src/lib/permissions.test.ts - rozsireni testu o hasCapability a grant-aware can*/assert*

tech_choices.choice: Allow-only granty + zmena role-defaultu pro zuzeni (varianta a), NE tri-stav allow/deny/inherit (varianta b).
tech_choices.reason: MVP jednoduchost: jediny pripad zuzeni (fakturace pro LAWYER) lze vyresit zmenou defaultu helperu + data-migraci. Tri-stav by zavedl porovnavaci logiku a precedenci do kazdeho helperu predcasne. Rozsiritelne pozdeji bez breaking change (deny by se pridal jako samostatny model/sloupec, kdyby vznikl realny pozadavek).

tech_choices.choice: Granty na usera nese getCurrentUser, helpery zustavaji synchronni.
tech_choices.reason: permissions.ts je jedina autorita a vsechny *VisibilityWhere/can*/assert* jsou synchronni ciste funkce volane napric repem. Async-load uvnitr helperu by vynutil prepsani stovek callsite. Pribaleni capabilities[] na user objekt je minimalni zmena s fail-closed chovanim pro role-only callery.

tech_choices.choice: Desired-state save (deleteMany+createMany v transakci) misto inkrementalniho grant/revoke.
tech_choices.reason: Atomicke, idempotentni, odolne vuci @@unique, jedno tlacitko ulozit (R.4). Konzistentni s thick-server-action vzorem (validace -> mutace v transakci -> audit -> revalidate).
Pouziva se Prisma, existujici form helpers (src/lib/form.ts), writeAuditLog, node:test. Zadny Zod (repo ho nepouziva).

conflicts.why: Zuzeni defaultu z {ADMIN,PARTNER,LAWYER} na {ADMIN,PARTNER} JE behavior change: stavajici advokati (LAWYER) okamzite ztrati pravo vystavovat/upravovat/stornovat faktury, evidovat platby, posilat upominky a spravovat zalohy, dokud jim ADMIN nepridel MANAGE_INVOICES. Bez data-migrace (grant vsem aktivnim LAWYER) to je provozni regrese fakturacniho modulu. Resi se data-migraci v same migration.sql (viz open_question #1, bezpecny default = udelit).

billing/page.tsx gatuje jen assertModuleEnabled(BILLING), ne assertCanManageInvoices, a sidebar gatuje odkaz Fakturace jen na modul BILLING. Po zuzeni defaultu by LAWYER bez grantu videl odkaz i stranku, ale akce by hazely 'Nemate opravneni spravovat faktury'. Nutno pridat capability guard do sidebaru a assertCanManageInvoices do billing/page.tsx (a pripadne podstranek), aby se predeslo matoucimu UX. Neni to bezpecnostni dira (akce gate drzi), ale UX/konzistencni dluh.

conflicts.where: src/app/actions/work-logs.ts (canViewRates r.84/252/263) + page-level restrictTableView v projects/work-logs/subjects/dashboard
conflicts.why: VIEW_RATES grant musi byt promitnut JAK do server-side zpracovani (work-logs.ts neulozi manualHourlyRate/amount, kdyz uzivatel sazby nevidi - r.84,252,263), TAK do page-level restrictTableView (skryti sloupcu). Pokud se grant promitne jen do UI a ne do work-logs.ts, advokat s grantem by nemohl zadat sazbu, kterou vidi -> nekonzistence. Jelikoz canViewRates(user) cte capabilities z user objektu, staci aby getCurrentUser nesl granty - pak vsechny tyto callsite zacnou respektovat grant automaticky bez zmeny. Overit pri review, ze vsech 5+ callsite dostava usera z getCurrentUser (nesouciho capabilities), ne role-only string.

Pridani capabilities?: Capability[] na PermissionUser je optional -> string/role-only caller (testy, interni volani s UserRole) ho nema -> hasCapability vraci false -> fail-closed na role baseline. Zadna regrese pro existujici role-only volani, ale je treba to explicitne otestovat.

security.control: setUserCapabilities gatuje assertCanManageUsers (jen ADMIN/PARTNER). ADMIN/PARTNER maji vse pres roli, takze udeleni grantu sami sobe je no-op nad jejich opravnenimi - nelze se povysit nad ADMIN. Grant nikdy nemeni roli ani nepridava ADMIN/PARTNER schopnosti mimo definovany Capability enum.

Pred zapisem overit, ze cilovy userId je ACTIVE OrganizationMember v currentUser.organizationId (pattern z updateUserHoursPlan). organizationId na grant radku = currentUser.organizationId. getCurrentUser nacita granty filtrované na membership.organizationId, takze grant z jine org se nikdy neaplikuje, i kdyby v DB existoval.

hasCapability(user, cap) vraci false pro string/role-only/null usera a pro usera bez capabilities pole. can*/assert* helpery: 'hasCapability(user, cap) || roleDefault(user)'. Grant muze jen ROZSIRIT, nikdy nezuzi to, co dava role (allow-only).
Kazdy save zapise AuditLog (kdo, kdy, komu, pred/po seznam capability). Grant radek navic nese grantedById + grantedAt pro forenzni stopu.

VIEW_RATES je rozsiritelne pravo nad default 'jen ADMIN/PARTNER'. Skryti sloupce sazby je vynuceno server-side (restrictTableView + work-logs.ts nezapise sazbu), ne jen v CSS - uzivatel bez grantu sazby fakticky neziska.

scalability.note: Jeden dotaz findMany(userCapabilityGrant where userId+org) za request, deduplikovany React cache(). Pocet grantu na usera je radove jednotky -> zanedbatelne. Zadny N+1.
Enum roste pomalu (jednotky az nizke desitky). Model 1:N zvlada libovolny pocet bez schema zmeny krome ALTER TYPE ADD VALUE. Single-tenant per-klient DB -> zadny tlak na sdileni.

handoff.context_for_review: Implementuj per-user capability granty striktne v poradi z 'required_checks' / 'steps'. Klicove invarianty: (1) permissions.ts helpery ZUSTAVAJI synchronni a ciste - grant cti VYHRADNE z user.capabilities, nikdy async-load uvnitr helperu; (2) zmena defaultu assertCanManageInvoices/canManageInvoices z {ADMIN,PARTNER,LAWYER} na {ADMIN,PARTNER} JE behavior change a MUSI jit ruku v ruce s data-migraci grantujici MANAGE_INVOICES vsem aktivnim LAWYER (no-regression); (3) cross-org guard v setUserCapabilities pres overeni membershipu ciloveho usera; (4) jeden spolecny save, ne per-toggle; (5) DB v sandboxu nedostupna -> migrace rucne jako SQL. Po dokonceni predej invoice-code-reviewer s durazem na regresi fakturace a konzistenci vsech callsite dotcenych helperu. NEimplementuj tri-stav deny ani dalsi capability nad MANAGE_INVOICES/VIEW_RATES.
required_checks: schema.prisma: enum Capability {MANAGE_INVOICES, VIEW_RATES} + model UserCapabilityGrant (@@unique([userId,capability]), org-scoped, indexy, FK Cascade/SetNull) + relace na User a Organization; pote npm run db:generate.

Rucni migrace prisma/migrations/<ts>_user_capability_grants/migration.sql: CREATE TYPE "Capability" AS ENUM (...); CREATE TABLE "userCapabilityGrants" (...) s PK, FK na users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, grantedById -> users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL; UNIQUE (userId, capability); CREATE INDEX na organizationId a userId. Pote data-migrace: INSERT MANAGE_INVOICES pro vsechny userId z organizationMembers se status='ACTIVE' a role='LAWYER' (id = gen, organizationId z membershipu, grantedById NULL). CREATE TYPE i CREATE TABLE smi byt v jedne migraci; ADD VALUE pravidlo se zde netyka (novy typ).

src/lib/permissions.ts: PermissionUser += 'capabilities?: Capability[]'; pridat 'export function hasCapability(user: PermissionInput, cap: Capability): boolean' (false pro string/null/chybejici pole = fail-closed); upravit canViewRates -> 'canViewAllLegalData(user) || hasCapability(user, Capability.VIEW_RATES)'; upravit canManageInvoices/assertCanManageInvoices: novy default 'canViewAllLegalData(user) || hasCapability(user, Capability.MANAGE_INVOICES)' (ODSTRANIT '|| roleOf(user)===LAWYER').

src/lib/auth.ts getCurrentUser: po nacteni membershipu nacist prisma.userCapabilityGrant.findMany({where:{userId:user.id, organizationId: membership.organizationId}, select:{capability:true}}) a vratit '{...user, role, organizationId, capabilities: grants.map(g=>g.capability)}'. Zachovat cache().

src/app/actions/users.ts: setUserCapabilities(formData) - assertCanManageUsers + overeni ACTIVE membershipu ciloveho usera v currentUser.organizationId; prisma.$transaction([deleteMany where userId, createMany vybrane capability s organizationId+grantedById]); auditLog.create; revalidatePath('/settings','/work-logs','/billing'). Parsovat capability pres formData.getAll a filtr na platne Capability hodnoty.

src/app/(app)/settings/page.tsx: nova Section 'Opravneni uzivatelu' viditelna jen kdyz canViewAllLegalData(currentUser); per uzivatel checkboxy (MANAGE_INVOICES, VIEW_RATES) s aktualnim stavem z nactenych grantu; jeden submit na setUserCapabilities. Nacist granty vsech uzivatelu org pres safeQuery.
src/lib/labels.ts: capabilityLabels = {MANAGE_INVOICES:'Sprava faktur', VIEW_RATES:'Zobrazeni sazeb a castek'} (over presne ceske formulace s navrhem UI).

src/app/(app)/billing/page.tsx (+ podstranky invoices/approvals/retainers/export dle gate): pridat assertCanManageInvoices(currentUser) vedle assertModuleEnabled, aby uzivatel bez opravneni nedostal stranku s nefunkcnimi akcemi (viz open_question #2).

src/components/app-sidebar.tsx: pridat per-link capability guard pro odkaz Fakturace (skryt bez MANAGE_INVOICES a bez ADMIN/PARTNER) - vyzaduje protlacit capabilities/can-helper do sidebaru; over jak sidebar dostava usera.

src/lib/permissions.test.ts: testy - hasCapability (false pro string/null/bez pole, true kdyz capability v poli); canViewRates (ADMIN/PARTNER true bez grantu; LAWYER/TRAINEE/INTERN false bez grantu, true s VIEW_RATES grantem); assertCanManageInvoices (ADMIN/PARTNER ok; LAWYER bez grantu THROW; LAWYER s MANAGE_INVOICES grantem ok; TRAINEE/INTERN bez grantu THROW); fail-closed pro role-only string caller.

Verifikace: npm run lint && npm run build && node --test (permissions.test.ts). Over, ze vsech ~10 callsite canViewRates a vsech ~10 callsite assertCanManageInvoices dostava usera z getCurrentUser (nesouci capabilities), ne role-only string.
MEMORY: migrace user_capability_grants pridava polozku k 'migration pending' (DB v sandboxu nedostupna -> spustit db:migrate na prostredi s DB).
